name_en: Fendi Small Monogram Tote, new brown calfskin wrist strap, can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, full of vintage charm, absolutely a must-have it bag this year! Don't let its small size fool you, it holds all the essentials you need to carry out. This little cutie is simply irresistible.
name_cn:
Fendi Small Monogram Tote, new brown calfskin wrist strap, can be carried by hand or worn crossbody, full of vintage charm, absolutely a must-have it bag this year! Don't let its small size fool you, it holds all the essentials you need to carry out. This little cutie is simply irresistible.
83292B Size 16.5x6x17.5cm
